case_title: GARY MOORE VS. DREYERS GRAND ICE CREAN INC et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-25-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED JUN-17-2008 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR ROBERT C GOODMAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-15-2008 THROUGH MAY-15-2008.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT DREYERS GRAND ICE CREAN INC
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-04-2008. NOV-09-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE FEB-14-2008.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR GOODMAN, ROBERT C
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT DREYERS GRAND ICE CREAN INC

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, GARY AS TO DEFENDANT DREYERS GRAND ICE CREAN INC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-09-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-07-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-25-2007

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, GARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DREYERS GRAND ICE CREAN INC $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF GARY MOORE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2008, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR PANOS LAGOS.
